contract and plan IDs in the data file for the reference year (year of the data file) represent the same 
plan in the prior year, compare this variable (along with the corresponding CONTRACT_ID_23) to the 
PLAN_ID_22 (and CONTRACT_ID_22). 

You need to know both the contract number (variable called CONTRACT_ID_YY) and plan benefit 
package identifier to identify the specific plan benefit package offered to beneficiaries.
